jobs.justification: O candidato possui experiência DIRETA no domínio central da vaga, com sólida experiência em papéis técnicos de gerenciamento de programa/produto (PM/TPM) em um ambiente de startup/scale-up. Ele demonstra habilidades em gerenciamento de programa, análise de dados, uso de IA e ferramentas técnicas, além de liderança transversal. O perfil do candidato se alinha muito bem com os requisitos-chave da vaga.
jobs.main_gap: Nenhum gap identificado. O candidato atende plenamente aos requisitos da vaga.
jobs.title: Technical Program Manager

core_requirements.requirement: 3+ years of experience in Technical Program Management, Engineering Program Management, or a similar cross-functional technical role
core_requirements.evidence: ~3 years in TPM and PM tech roles

core_requirements.requirement: Proven track record of delivering complex, multi-team software programs in a fast-paced, startup or scale-up environment
core_requirements.evidence: Experience in TPM role at Instituto Atlântico, coordinating 3 teams and 25 engineers in a global program with 200+ engineers. Also has experience in PM/PO role at Instituto Atlântico, reorganizing teams and reducing delivery cycle.

core_requirements.requirement: Hands-on ability to build internal tools using AI-assisted coding — you're comfortable with vibe coding: prompting AI to generate code, reviewing output, iterating, and shipping functional tools
core_requirements.evidence: Experience in building internal AI tools, such as timesheet validation automation at Instituto Atlântico

core_requirements.requirement: Strong technical fluency — you can read architecture diagrams, understand API contracts, reason about system design
core_requirements.evidence: Background in data analysis and working with various technical tools and frameworks, such as SQL, Python, Spark/Scala, Databricks, and GenAI.
